description: A person stands on a rocky, sun-drenched cliff overlooking a vast, deep blue sea. The waves are crashing against the shore, creating white foam. The coastline is rugged and appears to be made of layered rock. The sky is a clear, vibrant blue. A small green shrub is visible in the foreground.
location_context: This image appears to be taken at a coastal location with dramatic cliffs and a deep blue sea, likely a Mediterranean island or coastal region.
time_context: Daytime, likely mid-morning or early afternoon, with clear, bright sunlight.
